content.json:
# CLOPR2 DR Operational Dashboard
**Secure Hybrid DR Gateway** | Owner: KATAR711 | Team: BCLC24

Real-time visibility across the on-prem HA cluster and Azure DR environment.

> **Coverage:** pg-primary, app-onprem (on-prem) | vm-pg-dr-fce (Azure DR)
> **Gap:** pg-standby not visible — Arc extension (HCRP409) pending

---

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Count = count() by Computer
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen > ago(5m), 'ONLINE', 'SILENT')
| project Computer, Status, LastSeen, HeartbeatCount = Count
| order by Computer asc
content.title: Host Availability — On-Prem Hosts (last 10 min)

content.query:
Syslog
| where Computer == 'pg-primary'
| where ProcessName == 'Keepalived_vrrp'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| project TimeGenerated, Event = SyslogMessage
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20
content.title: Keepalived VRRP Events — pg-primary (last 1h)

content.query:
Syslog
| where Computer == 'pg-primary'
| where ProcessName == 'Keepalived_vrrp'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize
    PriorityDrops = countif(SyslogMessage contains 'priority from 100 to 80'),
    PriorityRestores = countif(SyslogMessage contains 'priority from 80 to 100'),
    BackupEvents = countif(SyslogMessage contains 'Entering BACKUP')
| extend PrimaryStatus = iff(BackupEvents > 0, 'BACKUP (VIP moved away)', 'MASTER (holding VIP)')
content.title: Keepalived HA Summary — pg-primary Status (last 24h)

content.query:
Syslog
| where Computer == 'app-onprem'
| where ProcessName == 'systemd'
| where SyslogMessage has_any ('docker', 'Docker')
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, SyslogMessage
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 10
content.title: App Service Health — Docker Events on app-onprem (last 24h)

content.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| where SeverityLevel in ('err', 'crit', 'alert', 'emerg', 'warning')
| where Computer in ('pg-primary', 'app-onprem')
| summarize Count = count() by Computer, SeverityLevel, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Syslog Error Trend — On-Prem Hosts (last 6h)

content.json:
---
## Monitoring Coverage

| Host | Heartbeat | Syslog | VRRP Events | DR Role |
|------|-----------|--------|-------------|---------|
| pg-primary | Online | Yes | Yes | PostgreSQL Primary, Keepalived MASTER |
| app-onprem | Online | Yes | N/A | FastAPI application host |
| vm-pg-dr-fce | Online (dr-fce workspace) | Limited | N/A | Azure DR replica |
| pg-standby | **Not available** | No | No | Arc extension gap (HCRP409) |

**Active Alert Rules:** 5 total (4 in dev workspace + 1 in dr-fce workspace)

| Alert | Severity | Signal | Trigger |
|-------|----------|--------|---------|
| alert-onprem-heartbeat-silence | Critical | Heartbeat | pg-primary or app-onprem silent > 10m |
| alert-keepalived-priority-drop | High | Syslog VRRP | pg_isready fails (priority 100→80) |
| alert-keepalived-vip-state-change | Critical | Syslog VRRP | pg-primary enters BACKUP state |
| alert-app-docker-failure | High | Syslog systemd | Docker stopped on app-onprem |
| alert-pgdr-heartbeat-silence | Critical | Heartbeat | Azure DR VM silent > 10m |

**Notification:** ag-clopr2-ops (email) + ag-clopr2-ops-dr (email)
**Governance:** docs/03-operations/alerting-architecture.md
